inputs.label: Radius (r)
inputs.businessContext: Radial distance from the origin (spherical coordinate).

inputs.label: Polar Angle (θ)
inputs.businessContext: Angle from the positive z‑axis, 0° to 180°.

inputs.label: Azimuthal Angle (φ)
inputs.businessContext: Angle in the xy‑plane from the positive x‑axis, 0° to 360°.

inputs.label: Cartesian x
inputs.businessContext: x‑coordinate of the point (Cartesian input for reverse conversion).

inputs.label: Cartesian y
inputs.businessContext: y‑coordinate of the point (Cartesian input for reverse conversion).

inputs.label: Cartesian z
inputs.businessContext: z‑coordinate of the point (Cartesian input for reverse conversion).
